metadata.name: NetBird Provider
metadata.description: Configures the NetBird Terraform provider with management API access.

items.name: netbird_management_url
items.title: Management URL
items.description: NetBird Management API URL. Trailing slashes are trimmed. TLS certificates must be trusted by the OpenTofu runner because the provider does not expose a skip-verification option.

items.name: netbird_tenant_account
items.title: Tenant Account
items.description: Optional tenant account ID for impersonation.
